title: Loyalty Carousel Improvements
goal: To enhance the current rewards experience for members, through a redesign of the existing rewards pages, in line with the Avolta design framework.
description: We have enhanced the Rewards Home, the Rewards List and the Rewards detail pages from a UI perspective to improve discoverability, clarity and engagement from members. The enhancements included improved hierarchy, updated layouts and new display components where content can be managed in Umbraco. This provides a more consistent rewards experience that is easier for members to browse and encourages reward exploration.
